title: Ennakaaga Unnakaaga Lyrics Kadhal 2 Kalyanam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Naresh Iyer, Andrea
Lyrics: Pa Vijay
Songs: Ennakaaga Unnakaaga
Movie: Kadhal 2 Kalyanam

Ennakaaga, Unnakaaga, vennilavin saalaigal
indha nimishathile, indha nodigalile kidyaathe ellaigal
Manasuku kudai neetadhe, kanavuku suvar podathe
Iravuku bayam agagathe oh ohhh..
Nee kavalaigal vittu veliye vaa
pani kulirinil ninaivom vaa
Nilavuku thunai irupoam vaa

Netrenbadhu poyaachu, nalaigalum kaatrachu
Indrenbathu nam kaiyil, ippothe sernthachu
Netrenbadhu poyaachu, nalaigalum kaatrachu
Indrenbathu nam kaiyil, ippothe sernthachu

Unnai ennodu,oru megamaai, oru vaasamai,
oru nesamai kondu pogiren
nagaram nam kayil,naduchalayil vizhayadalam
Kadaloramaai konjam thoongalam

Indha indha nimidamaaga, boomi nindru poga
neyum naanum mattum vazhum iravodu irupom
enna enna sogam, innum innum enna aagum
poga poga kaalam maarum
nalaiku enendru nalaiku naam parkalam

Netrenbadhu poyaachu, nalaigalum kaatrachu
Indrenbathu nam kaiyil, ippothe sernthachu
Everythings gonna be ok,Everythings gonna be alright
Everythings gonna be ok,Everythings gonna be alright

Ohhh. yaarum illadha, indha salaigal andha vizhakugal
indha padagugal namakagave
nee naan ondraga, oru mathiri ,indha raathiri
ada chi chi chi bappapa re

yaarum illai enbadhaga, nanum ingu ninru poga
kooda vandhu thozhil saaya neethane irunthaai
Thalli podum prenchanaigal, meendum vandhu thottu parrkkum
Muttru pulli vaithu povom, nagam thannai narukiya
Viralonrum edhiri illai

Everythings gonna be ok,Everythings gonna be alright
Everythings gonna be ok and i am gonna be alright
Everythings gonna be ok,Everythings gonna be alright
Everythings gonna be ok and i am gonna be alright

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Ennakaaga Unnakaaga expresses the feelings of love and longing between two individuals, capturing the essence of romantic moments.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Kadhal 2 Kalyanam, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Naresh Iyer.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Ennakaaga Unnakaaga was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique style and melodies.

When was this song released?

This song was released on March 19, 2011, as part of the movie Kadhal 2 Kalyanam.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ennakaaga Unnakaaga from Kadhal 2 Kalyanam beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and connection between the protagonists. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes feelings of joy and romance, making it a perfect choice for special occasions. The collaboration between Andrea Jeremiah and Naresh Iyer brings a unique charm to the song, enhancing its appeal. This track not only highlights the bliss of love but also resonates with anyone who has experienced such emotions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennakaaga Unnakaaga from Kadhal 2 Kalyanam is a beautiful romantic duet that captures the essence of love and longing. Featuring the melodious voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Naresh Iyer, this song is a delightful blend of heartfelt lyrics by Pa Vijay and enchanting music by Yuvan. Experience the magic of this captivating track that perfectly encapsulates the joy of love.
stanzaMeanings: For me, for you, in this moment of the moonlight, in these moments, don't let go of everything. Don't let your heart be troubled, don't let your dreams fade away. Don't be afraid of the night. Come out and leave your worries behind, let's think in the cool breeze. Let's have the moon as our companion.

Our sight has faded, the days have passed. What we have now is in our hands, it has come together now. Our sight has faded, the days have passed. What we have now is in our hands, it has come together now.
I am taking you with me as a cloud, as a breeze, as a love. In our city, in our journey, let’s not fall apart. Let’s rest a little like the sea.
In this moment, the earth will go away, both you and I will live only during the night. What sorrows will come, what will happen next, time will change, we will see tomorrow.

Our sight has faded, the days have passed. What we have now is in our hands, it has come together now. Everything's gonna be ok, everything's gonna be alright. Everything's gonna be ok, everything's gonna be alright.
Ohhh. When no one is around, these moments and those feelings, these songs are for us. You and I are one, like this night, oh my goodness.

When there is no one, I too can leave from here. You were the one who came to work. The problems that arise will come back and touch us. We will go with a little mark, the city has been crushed. There is no one to oppose us.

Everything's gonna be ok, everything's gonna be alright. Everything's gonna be ok and I am gonna be alright. Everything's gonna be ok, everything's gonna be alright. Everything's gonna be ok and I am gonna be alright.
